# CappingAlpha

> CappingAlpha is a sports betting intelligence website. It scores and ranks the day's sports plays through a proprietary engine, then publishes the highest-conviction picks. Free users see the number one pick; paid users see the full ranked board (1 to 50). The Seeking Alpha for sports gambling.

We don't condone gambling. But if you're betting anyway, there's no reason to do it without checking CappingAlpha first.

## What it does

- Pulls together player data, historical outcomes, public market behavior, live lines, weather, and capper signals for each game.
- Normalizes everything through a proprietary scoring engine and ranks it into one daily list.
- Tracks the highest-conviction plays (MVP picks, 50+ points) long term and grades each one win, loss, or push once the game finishes.
- Covers MLB, NBA, WNBA, NHL, Tennis (ATP and WTA), and Golf.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://cappingalpha.com/): the live ranked board. Free users see the number one pick.
- [Track record](https://cappingalpha.com/results): every graded MVP pick, with the running win, loss, and push record.
- [FAQ](https://cappingalpha.com/faq): what CappingAlpha is, how picks are ranked, pricing, and how the record is kept.
- [Terms of Service](https://cappingalpha.com/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://cappingalpha.com/privacy)

## Pricing

- $1 for a single day (one-time)
- $4 per week (subscription)
- $75 per year (subscription)
- Free tier always shows the number one ranked pick of the day.

## Important notes

- CappingAlpha never wagers on any game and never tells anyone how to bet. It surfaces and ranks data; the user decides.
- All performance data is for informational purposes only. Past results are not indicative of future outcomes.
- Users must be 18 or older.
